Family-owned and community-focused plumbing for the Inland Empire & San Gabriel Valley — honest service, fair prices, quality work.

settings.title: Built on Honesty. Driven by Community.

settings.editor:
Regal Plumbing & Rooter was founded with a single mission: to bring honest, professional plumbing to the Inland Empire. Based in Ontario, CA, we serve more than 32 cities across Southern California with a team of licensed, background-checked technicians who take pride in their work and their community.

We believe plumbing service should be transparent. That means clear pricing before we start, straightforward explanations of what we find, and workmanship you can trust. No upsells, no surprise charges — just quality plumbing done right.

settings.description_text: We tell you what we find, quote you clearly, and only recommend work that's genuinely needed. No upsells, no manufactured urgency.
Every repair and installation is performed to California code standards with quality materials. We stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee.
We live and work in the Inland Empire. Our customers are our neighbors, and we treat every home with the same care we'd want for our own.
State of California licensed plumbing contractor
Comprehensive liability and worker's compensation insurance
All technicians pass rigorous background screening
Around-the-clock emergency dispatch for the Inland Empire
Written quotes before any work begins — no surprises
Serving the Inland Empire & San Gabriel Valley

settings.editor:
• Honest Assessment — We diagnose accurately and only recommend what your home truly needs.
  • Upfront Pricing — You get a clear quote before any work begins. Period.
  • Quality Materials — We use materials built to last, not the cheapest option to protect a margin.
  • Clean Worksite — We respect your home and leave every job site cleaner than we found it.

"We started Regal Plumbing because we believed the Inland Empire deserved better — a plumber who shows up on time, tells you the truth, and does the work right the first time. That's what we're here to do."

— Brayden & Nick, Co-Founders
